title: Short-Candidate Scanner
summary: Three short-candidate scan types added to scanner.py — breakdown (price below EMA20/50, bearish alignment), bearish momentum (RSI < 40, MACD bearish crossover), and intraday breakdown (down >3% from open). All scans are regime-weighted: limits expand in BEAR_TRENDING, run at reduced capacity in BULL_TRENDING. Shipped in Phase A commit (620e75d).
approach: Extended get_dynamic_universe() in scanner.py with scans 5a (breakdown), 7a (bearish_momentum), 8a (intraday_breakdown). EMA20/EMA50 added to FIELDS list. Regime-weighted limits: breakdown_limit = 25 if bear else 15 if choppy else 10. Short candidates flow into same universe as longs, scored by direction-agnostic signal engine.
